# GitHub Copilot instructions for TWN

Read and follow the repository-root `AGENTS.md`.

For each non-trivial request:

- locate the approved feature packet or relevant blueprint requirement;
- inspect the current implementation before proposing changes;
- explain the key concept before editing;
- plan one bounded task;
- ask before making product, architecture, schema, auth, dependency,
  deployment, or destructive decisions;
- implement only approved scope;
- run validation and report exact commands and results;
- update project records before ending substantial work.

Use evidence. Existing code does not prove a feature works; tests and browser
verification do. Never modify `blueprint.md`.
